problem id: 2d790c98
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) XOR NOT SHL(1)) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  10000010 -> 11010011
  01101010 -> 10001101
  01110000 -> 00011110
  11110011 -> 00111110
  10011101 -> 00011111
  00011000 -> 01001111
  00110110 -> 11110110
  10101000 -> 00110101
  00101010 -> 00001101
  00101001 -> 00111111

query: 01000000
predicted answer: 01111011
